title: 'One of saves of the season' - Kinsky's redemption moment at Tottenham?
summary: Goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky delivers a season-defining save for Tottenham in their battle to avoid Premier League relegation, providing redemption after being written off two months earlier. The crucial stop earns Spurs a vital point in their survival fight.
content: Two months after many thought Antonin Kinsky would never play for Tottenham again the goalkeeper makes one of the saves of the season to earn Spurs a point in their fight for Premier League survival.

zh.title: "赛季最佳扑救之一" - 金斯基在托特纳姆热刺的救赎时刻？
zh.summary: 门将安东宁·金斯基为托特纳姆热刺献出赛季决定性扑救，帮助球队争取躲避英超降级，在两个月前被看衰后获得救赎。这次关键扑救为热刺的保级之战赢得了宝贵的一分。

title: 'Brilliant' Belloumi turns Jakirovic's displeasure into delight
summary: Hull City winger Mohamed Belloumi produces a brilliant performance in the Championship play-off semi-final against Millwall, overcoming early struggles to deliver crucial moments. His standout display turns his manager's initial displeasure into delight and boosts Hull's playoff push.
content: Hull City winger Mohamed Belloumi made up for his lack of preparedness to win the Championship play-off semi-final against Millwall for his side.

zh.title: "出色"的贝洛米将亚基罗维奇的不悦转变为欣喜
zh.summary: 赫尔城边锋穆罕默德·贝洛米在英冠附加赛半决赛对阵米尔沃尔的比赛中表现出色，克服早期的挣扎并在关键时刻挺身而出。他的杰出表现将主教练最初的不悦转化为欣喜，并增强了赫尔城的附加赛冲击力。

title: Spurs hit self-destruct button again as season agony prolonged
summary: Tottenham's continued self-inflicted mistakes frustrate manager Roberto De Zerbi as their Premier League survival battle extends beyond a potential clinch opportunity. The poor performance forces Spurs to approach their final matches with their relegation fate still uncertain.
content: Spurs hit the self-destruct button once more to leave Roberto De Zerbi frustrated as fight to avoid relegation looks set to go to the wire, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 热刺再度自毁，赛季痛苦继续延续
zh.summary: 托特纳姆热刺继续自我伤害的错误让主教练罗伯托·德泽尔比感到沮丧，他们的英超保级之战延续超越了本应结束的机会。糟糕的表现迫使热刺在保级命运仍不确定的情况下面对最后的比赛。

title: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
summary: Troy Deeney selects his Premier League team of the week following the latest round of matches, showcasing standout performers from the weekend's action. Readers are invited to compare their picks with the former striker's selections.
content: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?

zh.title: 特洛伊的英超周最佳阵容中有谁?
zh.summary: 特洛伊·迪尼在最近一轮英超比赛后选出了他的周最佳阵容，展示了周末比赛中表现突出的球员。邀请读者将他们的选择与这位前锋的选择进行比较。

title: Football Daily
summary: Football Daily examines key decisions from the weekend's Premier League action, including whether David Raya was fouled and VAR's controversial rulings. The analysis assesses whether Tottenham's draw represents a missed opportunity in their critical survival push.
content: Was David Raya fouled, did VAR get it right and is a draw a missed opportunity for Spurs?

zh.title: 足球日报
zh.summary: 足球日报检视了周末英超比赛的关键判罚，包括大卫·拉亚是否遭犯规及VAR的争议判决。该分析评估了热刺的平局在关键阶段是否代表失去的机会。

title: Farke proud of 'resilient' Leeds after Spurs draw
summary: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke praised his side's mental resilience and mentality after securing a 1-1 draw away at Tottenham, with Dominic Calvert-Lewin's 74th-minute penalty earning the point. The result showcases Leeds' competitive character despite their playoff ambitions.
content: Leeds boss Daniel Farke is pleased with the "mentality" and "resilience" shown by his side as they earned a 1-1 draw away at Tottenham thanks to Dominic Calvert-Lewin's 74th-minute penalty.

zh.title: 法尔克为利兹与热刺战平时的'坚韧'表现感到自豪
zh.summary: 利兹联队主教练丹尼尔·法尔克在与热刺客场1:1战平后，称赞了球队的心理韧性和斗志。多米尼克·卡尔韦特-劳因在第74分钟的点球为球队赢得这一分。这个结果尽管利兹队有季后赛雄心，但展现了他们的竞争力。

title: Tottenham players good enough to stay up - De Zerbi
summary: Tottenham manager Roberto De Zerbi insists his squad possesses the quality to secure Premier League survival, despite their 1-1 draw with Leeds leaving them just two points above the relegation zone. The club faces a crucial final two matches to confirm their safety.
content: Tottenham boss Roberto De Zerbi says his players are good enough to stay up after their draw with Leeds United leaves them two points clear above the relegation zone with two games to play.

zh.title: 热刺球员足够优秀留在英超 - 德泽尔比
zh.summary: 热刺主帅罗伯托·德泽尔比坚持认为他的球队拥有足够的实力确保英超保级，尽管与利兹联1:1战平让他们仅落后降级区两分。该俱乐部面临最后两场关键比赛以确认保级安全。

title: Calvert-Lewin penalty earns Leeds draw at Tottenham
summary: Leeds United salvage a 1-1 draw at Tottenham after Dominic Calvert-Lewin converts a 74th-minute penalty, denying Spurs a crucial victory in their fight for Premier League survival. The result leaves Tottenham two points above the relegation zone with two games remaining.
content: Tottenham Hotspur squander the opportunity to take a significant step towards Premier League safety as they are held to a 1-1 draw at home by Leeds United.

title: Three clubs eyeing Bowen - Tuesday's gossip

content: Marseille manager Habib Beye dropped Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang for their trip to Le Havre on Sunday after he sprayed a fire extinguisher on a member of staff and his personal belongings on Thursday night, sources have told ESPN.

content: Former USWNT star Alex Morgan announced on Mother's Day that she and her partner, Servando Carrasco, are expecting their third child together.

content: Huddersfield Town boss Liam Manning leaves the club by mutual consent, two months after taking compassionate leave.

title: Milne alleged racist abuse towards Bokila 'not proven', says SFA

title: Fans, managers can hate on VAR, but Raya incident ...

content: It will be hard to top sealing the LaLiga title in El Clásico against rivals Real Madrid, but 2025-26 is a season that has left Barcelona wanting more.

title: Five 'fouls' in one move - breaking down Premier League corner chaos

content: The Premier League season has been defined by set-piece drama. It came to a head at West Ham on Sunday, when the VAR could have penalised any one of a handful of potential fouls.

title: Bosnia's Dzeko to join list of World Cup 40-year-olds

content: Former Manchester City striker Edin Dzeko is set to join exclusive list of players aged over 40 to play in a World Cup.

content: With Hearts and Celtic on course for a potential final-day decider, we look back to 1991 when it last happened in the Scottish top flight.

content: Newcastle United defender Rory Finneran receives his first call-up to the Republic of Ireland senior squad for their friendly against Grenada.

content: Watch Beth Mead score her 50th and 51st WSL goals for Arsenal with the England forward set to depart the club at the end of the season.

title: Arsenal 'legend' Mead to leave club at end of season

content: Arsenal describe forward Beth Mead as a "legend of the club" as they announce she is to leave at the end of the season.
